effort_complexity.rationale: Strict confined reference resolution and two fail-closed report contracts across CLI, gate, and MCP.

release_benefit: Makes planning ambiguity checks consume only explicit, confined, schema-valid normative evidence.

design_decisions.choice: Adopt typed spec.references and the dedicated spec-ambiguity report as the sole ambiguity-check contract, without legacy discovery fallback.
options: retain implicit discovery as compatibility fallback
continue using the generic LLM report shape
design_decisions.human_decision: Ratified by Brad (Coach), 2026-07-15: the Baton v0.15 tag is normative and Sworn must not reinterpret or weaken its typed-reference ambiguity contract.
design_decisions.rationale: A single explicit discovery surface is required for deterministic confinement and fail-closed planning checks.

positive_scenarios: A canonical typed-reference spec produces one dedicated ambiguity verdict.
negative_scenarios: Every unresolved, escaped, malformed, cross-schema, or mislabeled input fails before a trusted PASS.
validation.benefit_hypothesis: Explicit normative discovery prevents planners and models from silently grading different contracts.
